text:
Adult gastroenterologist often represents the final step 
of the transition process. The overall success of the transition 
of care and the successful completion of the final transfer are closely linked 
(58). The involvement of the treating physician in this process is 
also a factor in a successful transition. The transition involves 
gradual preparation in order to develop in young people 
knowledge of their disease, autonomy and communication 
skills, as well as a sense of responsibility 
for their care (59). When poorly managed, 
it leads to an increase in hospitalizations, a 
Figure 3: Pediatric ulcerative colitis activity score (PUCAI) (48)
